text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After an afternoon shopping, I start heading home as the sun does the
same for the night. I'm walking past the riverbank when...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Hah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The shout rings in my ears, like the sharp clang of an expertly wielded
blade. My feet stop, and my head unconsciously turns to the source.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...
choice_data_list: If I'm not mistaken, that's Yaeno Muteki.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Hup! ...Hah! ...Sei! ...Tah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Each punch, each kick... Her every movement cuts cleanly through the
evening air, punctuated by that same resounding, thunderous voice.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Exhale... Keh... HYAH!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm so awestruck, I hardly catch myself staring. Her form perfectly
balances ferocity with composure... I can tell she's devoted countless
time to refining her art, and it... it's beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pardon. May I have a word?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I notice that you don a Tracen Academy badge. Did you need me for
something, Trainer?
choice_data_list:
No, uh... I was just passing by and became
captivated by your forms. Sorry...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You really... Ahem. That is far too high of praise for one so
inexperienced as me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Even now, my heart was not clear of distractions. Tomorrow's tryouts
linger in my mind, no matter how I try to recollect myself through
training.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Still, an amateur though I am, I will apply all my abilities to the race.
It would be an honor to see you there, should your schedule permit it.
choice_data_list: Th-the honor would be all mine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Why am I being so formal? I feel like I'm talking to a wise old martial
artist, not a student!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then, out of nowhere—

text_block_list.name: Thuggish Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey, HEY! Who do you think you are? We don't need some little princess from the academy stinkin' up our turf!

text_block_list.name: Thuggish Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
If you wanna use our spot, you're gonna have to pay up and make it
worth our while!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...I turn my head to see two delinquents sauntering over to us.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Your turf, you say? To my recollection, this field is part of the public
park.

text_block_list.name: Thuggish Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Can it! You know what I damn mean, smartass! Hey boss, this Horsegirl's
bein' all uppity!

text_block_list.name: Thuggish Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, she's uppity all right. But how long's she gonna be able to
keep the smug act up? Just saying, but if you don't want trouble, pay
up or go back to playin' tag on your school playground.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The "boss" of the pair scowls at Yaeno Muteki with an intimidating
leer... But I can't let her get away with this!
choice_data_list: You there, stop this at once!
You there, stop this at once!

text_block_list.name: Thuggish Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: The hell?! You stay outta this!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: HAH!

text_block_list.name: Thuggish Pair
text_block_list.text: Ah?! Gulp...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki's cry shocks the pair like a bolt of lightning. They stop
still and look at her wide-eyed.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Now then... Are you going to press this matter further?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her voice is light and calm, like the quiet surface of a lake. At the
same time, though, there's a cold, unfathomable depth to it.

text_block_list.name: Thuggish Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: ...Nah, we're leaving. I can see we're outmatched.

text_block_list.name: Thuggish Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huh? Boss, wait! D-don't leave without meee!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for raising my voice. I thought only to resolve the
situation at hand, but I am sorry if I startled you.
choice_data_list: Oh, I'm fine. Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm just amazed by the way she demonstrated such raw power without
letting her composure slip for a second. There wasn't even a hint of
anger on her face!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...You flatter me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Now I'm really curious what her running is like. I excuse myself for the evening, bubbling with excitement for the tryouts tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And, come the next day, that excitement only builds. I head to the
track to watch Yaeno Muteki's race, and start looking around.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
That one there, Super Creek—she was amazing out there! She's
already made such a strong impression on everyone.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap stood out too. I can see why they call her the Beast. She's
still rough around the edges, but there's definitely a real gem hiding
in her.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
There are so many promising racers at the tryouts this time. We're in
for some wild races when this generation hits the big tracks.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...I'm here too. This time, I'll prove myself. I'll reap the fruits of my
training and win glory today—I swear I will!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Panting...

text_block_list.name: Racer
text_block_list.text: ...All right, here goes. Haaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ah! You're not... passing me!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Racer
text_block_list.text: Hehe, she really did fall for it!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki... Looks like she took the bait. If she doesn't regain her
head quickly, she'll burn all her energy before the last spurt.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
To think she'd make the same mistake again... She had so much
potential, but if she can't keep cool in races, that's the end of it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe my eyes. The Yaeno Muteki I saw yesterday was so
composed. She wielded the fiery spirit within her like a tempered
blade, keeping it quiet in its sheath until the moment she struck! But
now...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I swear... I'll keep... pushing ahead! Hraaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She rampages with a wild ferocity. Unable to temper the flames within
her, Yaeno Muteki burns up her energy and loses the race.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: How could I... let this happen again?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Amateur! I keep making such... such amateur mistakes! I won't be able
to restrain the blaze within me like this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can see frustration written all over her face, and yet, I can't summon
the words to speak up. Silently, helplessly, I watch as she leaves...
